data.title: Sprint SKILL.md Phases 2-8: terminology migration + CHECKPOINT semantic names
data.description:
Edit plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md Phases 2-8 (~lines 271-1326).

## Pre-condition
Read the --resume logic in Phase 1 and confirm it is label-based (CHECKPOINT N/6 string matching), not positional. If positional, add a migration shim before renaming.

## Changes
1. Rename phase headers:
   - "Post-Epic Validation" -> "Post-Primary Ticket Validation" (Phase 6)
   - Other epic-specific phase references -> "primary ticket" equivalent
2. Replace epic_id/epic-id variable references with primary_ticket_id/primary-ticket-id (except literal ticket CLI command arguments)
3. CHECKPOINT format: replace positional CHECKPOINT N/6 examples in new/modified sections with semantic names: CHECKPOINT:batch-N-complete, CHECKPOINT:review-passed, CHECKPOINT:validation-passed
4. Add backward-compat note in resume section: "Sprint reads old positional-counter checkpoints (CHECKPOINT N/6) without error and resumes from the last completed phase — no migration of existing checkpoint notes is required."
5. Keep <epic-id> in literal .claude/scripts/dso ticket CLI commands unchanged
6. IMPORTANT: Do NOT rename context envelope variables passed to prompt templates (red-task-escalation.md, ci-failure-validation-state.md) until Task 6a lands — avoid misalignment window

## TDD Exemption
Exempt — all changes are mechanical terminology renames with no new conditional branches (unit exemption criterion #2: change-detector — renaming/restructuring without altering observable behavior).

## Size Warning
If diff exceeds 600 lines, split into two sub-tasks: 5a (Phases 2-5 rename) and 5b (Phases 6-8 + CHECKPOINT). Reference SKILL.md HARD-GATE on SIZE_ACTION=reject.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No "Post-Epic Validation" in Phase 6 header
  Verify: { grep -q "## Phase 6: Post-Epic Validation" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] "Primary Ticket" in Phase 6 and Phase 8 headers
  Verify: grep -q "Primary Ticket" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] CHECKPOINT: prefix present
  Verify: grep -q "CHECKPOINT:" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Backward-compat note present
  Verify: grep -q "reads old positional" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
